title: Diminishing Tools (Programmer Art)
description: The Vanilla tweaks 'Diminish tool' resource pack redrawn in the style of Programmer Art
body:
[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) Offers a resource pack option that will graphically overhauled close to broken tools, However the textures provided on there only fit for Minecraft's modern look. 

This resource pack aims to fix that, keeping all functionality from the origianl vanilla tweaks version, and overhauled to work with minecraft's programmer art option!

This is meant to be used in conjuction with the [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp) Resource pack. 

Enjoy! :-) 

[!NOTE!] Version 2.0 Does not currently support spears of any weapon teir, sorry :/
